name: Critical Alert Escalation
description: Escalate critical and high priority alerts after 30 minutes if unacknowledged

steps.message: Second escalation: Critical alert still unacknowledged

_escalation_logic.steps: Sequential escalation levels with increasing urgency
_escalation_logic.delay: Minutes from alert creation to this escalation level
_escalation_logic.channels: Notification channels to use at this level

_example_timeline.T+15min: Level 1 escalation - notify admin_001 via EMAIL + PUSH
_example_timeline.T+30min: Level 2 escalation - notify admin_001 + admin_002 via SMS + EMAIL + PUSH
_example_timeline.T+60min: Level 3 escalation - notify all admins + manager via SMS + EMAIL
